title: Validate: typecheck (3 configs) + build + dist:linux smoke + grep audits
description: End-to-end validation against '## Exit Criteria' in context.md. Runs all typecheck configs, full build, and a Linux dist smoke build to prove electron-updater integrates without breaking packaging. Also performs static audits to enforce constraints.
acceptance_criteria: `npm run dist:linux` produces a runnable .AppImage in dist/ (file exists, non-zero size)
grep -rn '0\.1\.0' src/ returns no matches (no hardcoded version strings in renderer)
grep -rn 'electron-updater' src/ returns no matches (renderer must not import it)
grep -rn 'ipcRenderer' src/ returns no matches outside of preload.ts (renderer goes through window.app.update)
grep -n '"publish"' electron-builder.json finds the GitHub provider block
Manual dev-mode smoke: `npm run dev` opens the app, Configuracion shows 'Modo desarrollo' state, no uncaught errors in main or renderer console
Report any failed exit-criterion items from task.json with reproducible commands
deliverables: Validation report (in completion summary) listing each acceptance check + pass/fail
